comment: Exact lexical match on class label 'Person'.
Exact lexical match on class label 'Conference'.
Exact lexical match on class label 'Author'.
Exact lexical match on class label 'Administrator'.
Both denote paper submissions, but confOf:Paper is a subclass of Contribution while cmt:Paper is a subclass of Document with decision/review assignment semantics.
confOf:Member_PC is commented as 'Reviewer' and models a program committee reviewer role similar to cmt:Reviewer.
Both represent program committee members; confOf:Member_PC additionally carries reviewing/expertise restrictions.
Near-exact lexical and semantic correspondence between program committee chair roles.
Both denote thematic areas used to categorize papers/contributions.
Weak relation only: both are naming/title datatype properties, but cmt:name applies to Conference or Person whereas confOf:hasTitle applies to Contribution.
Both datatype properties capture a person's email address.
Both datatype properties represent the title of a submitted paper/contribution.
Both object properties link a submission to its topical area.
Both object properties relate an author to a paper/contribution they wrote.
Both are inverse-direction authorship relations from paper/contribution to author.
